aleabit.layer_label: Layer 3 — 军工子组件/特种火工品
aleabit.thesis: Small-cap STAR-board defense play with niche pyrotechnic and propellant exposure — the kind of obscure subcomponent vendor that sits behind missile and UAV programs. PB 5.23 is rich, but float is tight and coverage is thin. Defense bottlenecks rarely show up on screeners; this one whispers.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: Niche propellant/pyrotechnics supplier into multiple defense primes

signals.name: 技术深度门槛
signals.note: Energetic materials and qualification process create moats

red_flags: SOE governance limits CEO buy signal
aleabit.ai_relevance: Indirect — defense electronics adjacency, UAV programs, but not AI-thesis core
